title: H.B. Fuller India is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: H.B. Fuller India is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
We at H.B. Fuller India are looking for an experienced Quality Control Engineer based out of Rajkot. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About H.B. Fuller India:
H.B. Fuller India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in ERP Systems

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Referral bonus program
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with H.B. Fuller India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
